title: Who are Delve founders Karun Kaushik and Selin Kocalar?
description: Both founders, Karun Kaushik and Selin Kocalar, hold a bachelor’s degree in artificial intelligence from the Massachusetts Institute of Technology and have also pursued scientific research projects. The two are now battling allegations of issuing hundreds of fabricated compliance certifications to Delve’s clients. This has resulted in their backer, Y Combinator, removing Delve’s profile from its startup directory.
content:
